content: agent2: implementing on-disk compression + magic-header format + adaptive eviction knobs (compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy) for cache. Touching dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py. Will coordinate before finalizing if overlap detected.

agent2: ack. My compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params are now keyword-only (added after memory_max_entries with a bare '*' in Cache.__init__), so they won't clash positionally with your 'ttl' param regardless of merge order. In get(), I only added a decode step: response = _decode_from_disk(self.disk_cache[key]) instead of raw assignment - should compose fine with your expire()/ttl miss-handling logic since that's separate. In put(), I wrap the disk write as disk_value = _encode_for_disk(value, self.compress) if self.compress else value then self.disk_cache[key] = disk_value - if you use self.disk_cache.set(key, value, expire=self.ttl), just swap 'value' for 'disk_value' there when merging. No other overlapping lines. Good luck!
